name: Card Conveyor — Z-Space Depth Rail
description: Cards travel forward through Z-space on a perspective rail, cycling like a depth carousel. Spawns cards at back, accelerates toward viewer, exits with tilt+fade, recycles content. Culminates in pick-pop selection with context recession.

farZ.description: Z-position where cards spawn (back of rail)

frontZ.description: Z-position of the front of the conveyor

exitZ.description: Z-position where cards exit past the camera

gap.description: Z-distance between cards on the rail

speed.description: Base speed in Z-units per second

backY.description: Y offset for cards at the back

frontY.description: Y offset for cards at the front

steadyCardCount.description: Number of cards on rail at steady state

introSpawnIntervalMs.description: Interval between card spawns during intro

loopDurationMs.description: Duration of the loop phase before outro

sub_primitives.name: Exit Tilt Fade
sub_primitives.description: Cards exiting get rotateX tilt (0→-18deg) + opacity fade.

sub_primitives.name: Context Recession
sub_primitives.description: Non-selected items recede by rank: deeper items get more Z-push, scale reduction, opacity fade.

when_to_use: Hero content reveal — cycling through options before selecting one
Feed/list entrances where content should feel live and dynamic
Product demos showing AI-generated content arriving in real-time
when_to_avoid: Simple list displays — this is a heavy animation for hero moments only
Scenes under 3 seconds — the intro→loop→outro→hold needs time
More than 10-12 content items — DOM performance degrades
ai_guidance: This is the first compound JS primitive. It requires usePhysicsEngine hook in Remotion. Use layer type 'card_conveyor' with a 'stories' array. Configure physics via conveyor_config overrides. The animation runs ~3.5s through intro→loop→outro→hold phases.
